title: New Desert Dungeon
description: This is a summary of my structured datapack. In my datapack there are 2new structures in because you can get 4new items with the new trial chamber feature
body:
In this datapack there is 2New dungeons 
at the first
minecraft:sahara_village
minecraft:sahara_palace

you can find the sahara_village when you open a ominous vault in a trial chamber then you have a chance to get the **_Sahara Village Explorer map_** 
![Ominous Vault in the trial chamber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c199ab66e075f22e8a8d38899b6f3219a465e3c.png)

When you found the sahara palace and you drink the Ominous bottle you can make in the sahara village a Trial omen raid and from the ominous vault in the trial omen you can get also the _**Sahara Palace Explorer map**
![Ominos vault in sahara palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9de7e9b574e763f7bc2ee04e0d95d8879e9d7792.png)_

-------**_Sahara Palace_**-------
![sahara palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b57c572fd604d31954466eb87d6ade2a149336c_0.webp)
### 
-You can play the dungeon without trial omen but you get not the best loot
also you can play the dungeon with trial omen and its harder
[sahara palace ominous key]

![Ominos vault in sahara palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccbb8b26ff37fab58f4c41e82c9ab61c2930b19.png)

-when you have the **Sahara Palace key** you can open the ominous Vault
with this vault you can get the **_Mace Template_** or the **_Reinforced Chestplate Template_**


![Ominous vault sahara palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4538aab2c10132da684dbeafff8af83def9d9cb3.png)

-------**_The Custom Raids_**------
#####
-When you combine the **Mace template** or the **_Reinforced Chestplate template_**
With the **_Raid Template_** what you get from the Trial spawners in the Sahara Palace you can start 2 new custom raids


![chestplate raid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee1e89e9aefd78ec9728ec1032950632395265e2_0.webp)

When you play the raid you can get good stuff but on the end at the end you get the **_Sahara mace_** or the **_Reinforced sahara chestplate_**
